translation.menuFinder: Find Current Food Menu of Universities
translation.chooseUniversity: Select the university you want to see the menu for
translation.notificationBody: Today is {{day}}. Check out what meals are waiting for you on campus!
translation.notificationSuccess: Notification successfully scheduled for {{date}} at 08:00 AM!
translation.notificationError: An error occurred while scheduling notification: {{error}}
translation.pastDateError: Cannot schedule a notification for a past date!
translation.resetAppDetails: The app will be completely reset and notifications will be cancelled. Are you sure?
translation.poolDescription: Click the bell icon next to dishes you like. You will receive a notification automatically when this dish is served.
translation.poolInfoText: Notifications are automatically scheduled for favorited dishes. You can manage them from daily cards.
translation.selectDormCity: Please select the city where your dormitory is located
